label_verbatim: (Name of Limited Liability Company)
rationale: Domestic-LLC name at the top of the form (the LLC whose Statement of Authority is being amended/cancelled). entity.name per the entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction convention since this is a Maine-record filing.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The Statement of Authority was originally filed on:
rationale: Date the original Statement of Authority was filed with the SOS. Novel key — distinct from entity.original_articles_filing_date (which references the entity's formation/qualification filing, not a subordinate Statement of Authority).

label_verbatim: SECOND: [ ] Amendment of Statement of Authority
Person or position the amendment affects:
rationale: Identifies the person or position whose authority is being amended.

label_verbatim: Description of amendment: (line 1)
rationale: First of four description lines for the amendment. Indexed line shape (description_1..description_4) preserves the form's literal four-line layout — synth concatenates from a single logical description string at fill time.

label_verbatim: Description of amendment: (line 2)
Description of amendment: (line 3)
Description of amendment: (line 4)
[ ] Cancellation of Statement of Authority
rationale: Mutually-exclusive radio option for filing.action_type='cancellation' (paired with Check Box3 above; only one of the two should be checked).

label_verbatim: Person or position the cancellation affects:
rationale: Identifies the person or position whose authority is being cancelled. Parallel to amendment.affected_person_or_position but scoped under cancellation.* because the form provides separate widgets per action.

label_verbatim: Description of authority that is being cancelled: (line 1)
rationale: First of four description lines for the cancellation.

label_verbatim: Description of authority that is being cancelled: (line 2)
Description of authority that is being cancelled: (line 3)
Description of authority that is being cancelled: (line 4)
Additional information is set forth in the attached Exhibit ___, and made a part hereof.
rationale: Inline exhibit-letter for additional information about the amendment/cancellation. Distinct from entity.additional_provisions_exhibit_letter (formation-style additional provisions) — this is filing-scoped and only applies when the amendment/cancellation needs more space than the four inline description lines.

label_verbatim: DATED ___
Authorized Person(s) — slot 1 — (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity for authorized-person signer slot 1 — Shape D per filing-signer-shape convention. Multi-slot extension of filing.signer.* (filing.signer_N.* indexed list when the form provides multiple parallel signer slots) — same pattern as MLLC-5A.

label_verbatim: Authorized Person(s) — slot 2 — (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity for authorized-person signer slot 2.
